name: Dig Deeper: The Disappearance of Birgit Meier
original_name: Dig Deeper: Das Verschwinden von Birgit Meier
overview: After Birgit Meier vanishes in 1989, police missteps plague the case for years. But her brother never wavers in his tireless quest to find the truth.
